name: AppX / UWP Package Registration
categoryDescription: Modern Windows artifacts — UWP/AppX packages, OneDrive, and Windows Subsystem for Linux.
description: Universal Windows Platform (UWP) app package registration and debug configuration — maps package family names to executable paths and capabilities.
forensic_value: PackagedAppXDebug enables custom debugger hooks for UWP apps — an attacker with system access could redirect UWP app execution to a malicious binary via this key.
